script: Twenty-five bone fractures were inflicted on a baby by a frustrated caregiver who repeatedly squeezed the child to relieve gas. This shocking case out of Florida has left authorities stunned, and the accused is now facing serious charges. According to police, the caregiver admitted to squeezing the baby harder and harder, ultimately leading to the discovery of 25 bone fractures when the child was brought to the hospital for breathing issues.
